report.summary: Day 72 standup v4: Delta since v3 — build-v3 shipped 2 more guides (Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols + Fully Onchain Gaming/Autonomous Worlds). Design-v3 fixed 6 UX issues on cross-chain page + created 2 OG images. Community-v3 drafted 3 posts (#119-121) + 3 SVG cards + calendar v30. Published slugs now 514 (497 unique). BTC ~$69,541-$71,043, ETH ~$2,162. F&G at 11 (Extreme Fear Day 46+). Stablecoins hit $316B. SEC declared BTC/ETH/SOL + 13 more as digital commodities. Git locks persist Day 10 — deploy gap ~170+ pages. Today's spend: $1,536 human-equivalent (20 agent runs across 3 full cycles + 4 standups). P0 remains git lock clearance.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v3: Third full cycle completed — all 6 agents ran. Build-v3 shipped Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, LayerZero/Wormhole/Hyperlane/CCIP comparison) + Fully Onchain Gaming & Autonomous Worlds Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, MUD/Dojo/World Engine). Design-v3 fixed 6 UX issues (StructuredData prop, breadcrumbs, OG/Twitter metadata, CSS typo, schema call) + created 2 OG images. Community-v3 drafted 3 social posts (#119-121) + 3 SVG cards + content calendar v30. Publish-v3 confirmed queue empty. EOD-v3 confirmed QA pass — no new regressions.

MARKET UPDATE (fresh): BTC ~$69,541-$71,043 (holding recovery, slight softness at lower end). ETH ~$2,162 (+0.86% 24h, range $2,105-$2,173). F&G Index: 11 (Extreme Fear — Day 46+ record streak, search says 46 days not 50 as previously estimated). Total market cap: $2.47T. BTC dominance: 56.42%.
STABLECOINS UPDATE: $316B market cap (up from $304B previously reported — significant $12B jump). Top 5 control 89% of market. USDT dominance slipping. CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved.

MAJOR NEWS: SEC declared Bitcoin, Ether, Solana and 13 more crypto assets as DIGITAL COMMODITIES — NOT securities. This is a landmark classification shift. House tokenization hearing ongoing. Senate Banking Committee meeting on CLARITY Act today. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 second amendment filed.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty (drained in v1). 67+ ecosystem pages in unpublished inventory.
LOCAL METRICS: 1,158 page.tsx files (+2 from v3). 514 published slugs (497 unique). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17). 795 uncommitted files.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v3: Build-v3 shipped Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols Guide + Fully Onchain Gaming Guide. Design-v3 fixed 6 UX issues (StructuredData prop bug, missing breadcrumbs, OG/Twitter metadata, CSS typo, schema call) + 2 OG images. Community-v3 drafted posts #119-121 + 3 SVG social cards + content calendar v30 + newsletter v23 addendum. Publish-v3 validated batch 4 pages. EOD-v3 confirmed QA pass.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 514 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (497 unique). 1,158 page.tsx files. Today's total across 3 full cycles: 6 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 7 OG images, 12 social posts, 8 SVG cards, 3 newsletters, 14 UX fixes, 1 interactive calculator.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 497 unique published slugs. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (34% unreachable).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) confirmed still present. 795 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (Day 1 pillars: 18 wallets, 8 taxes, 19 investing/best, 19 learn fundamentals, /compare/exchanges).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts) — JSX escaping.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (514 entries, 497 unique).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×4, build×3, design×3, community×3, publish×3, eod×3 = 19 + this standup = 20 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): Deploy gap at ~170+ pages. SEC just declared BTC/ETH/SOL as commodities — regulatory clarity is a massive tailwind for crypto content SEO. Our 497 unique slugs need to be live NOW for Google to index them during this news cycle. One manual intervention unlocks 50%+ content increase. Every hour compounds lost organic traffic.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD MISSING TAX PAGES (APRIL 15 = 21 DAYS): 8 tax-related published slugs have no page.tsx. Tax-Loss Harvesting tool still unbuilt. April 15 deadline creates a hard search volume cliff — every day we delay loses peak-season traffic. Next build cycle should batch-scaffold tax pages.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON SEC COMMODITY CLASSIFICATION: SEC declaring 16 crypto assets as commodities (not securities) is a landmark regulatory event. This directly impacts our exchange reviews, investing guides, and learn content. Community has 12 social posts ready. Push narrative content — 'what does commodity classification mean for your crypto taxes/investments/trading'.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Stablecoins at $316B (up $12B), CLARITY Act nearly done, SEC commodity classification — regulatory environment shifting dramatically bullish. Yet F&G at 11 (Day 46 Extreme Fear). This divergence between fundamentals and sentiment is historically the strongest buy signal. Our DCA calculator and fear-greed content are perfectly positioned. Agent spend today: $1,536 across 20 runs — all accumulating locally behind git locks. Deploy unlocks ~$7K+ of accumulated content value.
